beIN SPORTS 7.desc_ar: An ATP 250 clay-court tournament held in Bucharest, Romania, played on outdoor red clay. Part of the European clay swing leading into Roland Garros, it features a 28-player singles draw and 16-team doubles. The event rewards strong baseline play, endurance, and tactical construction, with valuable ATP ranking points and a title at stake.

In the world of sports, few debates ignite passion and enthusiasm quite like the discussion surrounding the greatest football players of all time. This topic transcends generations, cultures, and nationalities, as fans passionately defend their favorites and recount unforgettable moments on the pitch. From legendary goal scorers to masterful playmakers, the players who have left an indelible mark on the game deserve recognition and celebration. " Football Legends" explore the remarkable careers and contributions of these iconic players who have shaped the beautiful game.

beIN SPORTS 9.desc_ar: Qatar Equestrian Federation Cup 2026 concludes the Doha Equestrian Tour at Al Shaqab, bringing together more than 200 riders in CSI1* to CSI5* show jumping classes and a total prize purse of €784,000. beIN SPORTS XTRA 3.desc_ar: ONE Friday Fights 149 brings another thrilling night of Muay Thai, MMA, and kickboxing to Bangkok’s iconic Lumpinee Stadium on April 3. In the main event, Tomyamkoong looks to build on his dramatic bonus-winning victory against Bejenuta Maximus, who arrives after impressing in Europe. In the co-main event, Isannuea puts his perfect knockout record on the line against the unbeaten Khunpon, plus more explosive matchups.
